src: A classic teddy bear with light brown fur, creamy snout and paws, rounded ears, dark brown nose, and black bead eyes. The limbs are short and floppy.
edit: A low-poly teddy bear with angular, light brown geometric fur. It has simple, creamy white snout and paws, tetrahedron ears, and a triangular dark brown nose. The eyes are black spheres. The limbs are blocky and short.

per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-6MDi8o6VYHg-unsplash: the object sits on a dirt path stretching into the distance, surrounded by blurred greenery and an overcast sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-B3Jnug3rKrs-unsplash: An object rests on a stone ledge near a small step, surrounded by dense foliage and slightly mossy ground.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-BYZdCQDSNTY-unsplash: The object is against a wooden fence, intertwined with branches and some green leaves partially covering the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-F_imBoYwuTk-unsplash: The object peeks through a rustic wooden fence under a clear blue sky and bright sunlight, casting crisp shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-kBo2MFJz2QU-unsplash: the object sits on a rough stone surface near a wooden fence casting faint shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-nKoIXtEfkZ8-unsplash: The object rests on wooden steps among leaves; the background has earthy tones. A small piece of white paper is nearby.
per_image_non_shared_src.marina-shatskih-sIzj2poobss-unsplash: The object is on a rocky surface of a dirt path, with an earthy landscape stretching behind.

per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-6MDi8o6VYHg-unsplash: A low-poly object on a minimalist dirt path extending into the distance, surrounded by angular, faceted greenery in vibrant polygonal shapes, with a slightly overcast sky of flat planes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-B3Jnug3rKrs-unsplash: The object rests on a stone ledge in low-poly style with faceted surfaces and angular edges, next to a small geometric step. Background foliage has polygonal leaves, with a mossy ground beneath in green low-poly textured polygons.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-BYZdCQDSNTY-unsplash: The object is against a wooden fence with geometric polygons, branches with faceted textures, and angular green leaves partially covering the background, in a low-poly style with sharp, clean lines and flat shading.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-F_imBoYwuTk-unsplash: The object peeks through a low-poly wooden fence with geometric shapes under a polygonal blue sky. The sunlight casts angular shadows. The scene features minimal textures with faceted polygons, capturing low-poly art.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-kBo2MFJz2QU-unsplash: A low-poly object on a stone surface with simple geometric shapes. Adjacent is a wooden fence made of elongated polygons, casting polygon shadows on the stone. The low-poly style highlights clean lines and uncomplicated forms in digital artistry.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-nKoIXtEfkZ8-unsplash: The object rests on angular wooden steps with sharp edges among faceted leaves in a low-poly style. A polygonal landscape with earthy hues is in the background. A triangular white paper lies nearby, contributing to the minimalist aesthetic.
per_image_non_shared_edit.marina-shatskih-sIzj2poobss-unsplash: The object is on a faceted rocky surface of a dirt path, with geometric, earthy shapes extending in low-poly style to the horizon. The landscape has flat surfaces, clean edges, and lines, maintaining a consistent low-poly appearance.
